creator: lulf@pvv.ntnu.no
text:
On tor, jul 19, 2007 at 07:10:31 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/bzrtools,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/114749 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114749
I approve.
-- 
Ulf Lilleengen
